title: Recipe for Disaster

startPoint.en: Speak to the cook in Lumbridge Castle.
startPoint.es: Habla con el cocinero en el Lumbridge Castle.

quests: Recipe for Disaster: Another Cook's Quest

kills: Icefiend (Level 35) (Only if ice gloves are not already owned)
Evil Chicken (Levels vary around 70, depending on player's level)
Without prayers or familiars Agrith-Na-Na (Level 89) Flambeed (Level 89) Karamel (Level 89) Dessourt (Level 92) Gelatinnoth Mother (Level 91) Culinaromancer (Level 98)

rewards.display: Experience 28,000 experience 1,000 experience 2,500 experience 1,000 experience 1,000 experience 1,000 experience 2,500 experience 1,500 experience 1,500 experience 4,000 experience 10,000 experience A 20,000 experience antique lamp for any skill above 50 (can be banked)

rewards.name: Mogre Camp
rewards.display: Access to the following areas: Mogre Camp Evil Chicken's Lair

rewards.name: Stew
rewards.display: Ability to add coloured spices to stews of any sort

rewards.name: Karamja
rewards.display: Ability to use the boat trip to travel between Karamja and Feldip Hills

rewards.name: Culinaromancer's Chest
rewards.display: Full access to Culinaromancer's Chest Access to the metal gloves such as Dragon gloves, plus Barrows gloves Access to Kitchen weaponry Access to the banking chest (under Lumbridge Castle) Access to a food store in the Chest

rewards.name: Chef Surprize
rewards.display: Chef Surprize (after completing Another Cook's Quest - after the dining room cutscene)

rewards.name: Chickened Out
rewards.display: Chickened Out (during Freeing Sir Amik Varze - the Evil Chicken's Lair)

rewards.name: Davy Jones' Locker
rewards.display: Davy Jones' Locker (during Freeing Pirate Pete - the Mogre Camp)

rewards.name: Mastermindless
rewards.display: Mastermindless (during Freeing the Lumbridge Sage - the quiz show)

rewards.name: Too Many Cooks...
rewards.display: Too Many Cooks... (during Freeing the Goblin Generals - the Goblin Village basement)

guideNote.en: This quest is a hub for several sub-quests, each already listed separately in this app with its own step-by-step guide. There isn't a single walkthrough for the hub itself — check the wiki page for the full overview.
guideNote.es: Esta misión es un resumen que agrupa varias sub-misiones, cada una ya listada por separado en esta app con su propia guía paso a paso. No existe una guía única para la misión en sí — consulta la página del wiki para ver el resumen completo.
